name: vilya-skill-registry
description: Git-native registry for the Vilya skills — reads SKILL.md files as the source of truth, surfaces version history from git.

scripts.predev: npm run sync:github-projects-template && npm run sync:skills
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:github-projects-template && npm run sync:skills
scripts.pretest: npm run sync:github-projects-template && npm run sync:skills
